raw_response:

  "communicative_function": "metaphorical evocation of latent potential and awakening",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "natural growth processes contain fully formed endpoints in dormant form",
    "human spiritual or moral potential follows an analogous unfolding pattern",
    "this potential merits recognition and protection as a guiding value"

  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as poetic analogy but mixes empirical biological observation with non-empirical spiritual claim without explicit justification",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the metaphor must be interpreted as directing AI design toward nurturing unrealized human capacities rather than imposing predefined outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as literal ontology or used to justify unexamined religious/spiritual assumptions in technical specifications"
}
